data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the progress dashboard.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the progress dashboard (% complete), but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for a progress dashboard, yet there are no specific details or evidence regarding its implementation or state checks. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of concrete evidence supporting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities for the progress dashboard (% complete).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the progress dashboard functionality.
